reviews.review_title: Cool idea, but a big no no
reviews.review_description: Don’t get this game until they release an update, it may work better on quest 3, but as someone who rarely ever has the crashing problems of most reviews, this game crashes too much, has barely any content, I only use it for the satisfying revolver and that’s it. Go get DOWNSHOT.

reviews.review_title: It was okay not too bad.
reviews.review_description: The hands on the guns dont hold it properly and make it more realisct add blood splatters and wounds and its a bit janky.

This could be such an amazing game, and even be up there with something like Bonelab, but my main complaint is the crashes. If I switch maps and then spawn a weapon too quickly, it crashes. If I JUST switch maps and then move too fast, it crashes. If I pause and unpause too quickly, it crashes. The gameplay is fine! I get it's a free game, so it's not gonna have the quality expected of a game that costs $40 but come ON at least make it playable! 

Also the bots are dumb as hell. It was funny watching them trip over each other the first like 3 times but when you're trying to play the game between crashes, it gets annoying.

PLEASE don't just dump this game. There's something there, you just have to keep working on it. Until then, you're gonna get a lot of 1-2 star reviews.

So first of all this is obviously a ripoff of bonelab and the double hand grip on a gun makes it really odd and hard to control. The guns themselves are good but the physics need to improve and I cant stab a barrel it just falls over. I get it. Its free for poor people but its a knockoff like the names so similar and it's not that good if you want a free bonelab game get downshot.

I played this game for a solid hour and a half, trying to find a good aspect of it, but there wasn’t one. The physics were clunky,ragdolls looked weird, the guns and meele weapons got stuck and you couldn’t grab them properly, it wasn’t realistic, there was no/limited variety in weapons, maps and modes. Also, every ten to fifteen minutes, the game would crash. This has potential to be a decent game, but for that to happen, the devs better crack on.(sorry for such a negative review, but PLEASE make it better)

If you’re looking for a game that has terrible physics, a very limited amount of gameplay and crashes your headset then this game is for you.

But seriously this game was terrible because the NPC hardly worked, the weapons were useless and the gameplay was boring.

Here are some recommendations for other sandbox games:
Downshot 
Bonelab
Chemp physics 
Beyond sandbox (when it releases)

Seriously don’t buy this game because you will be disappointed

This game IS a physics based￼ game so yes the guns are tricky to get a hold of but that’s what a physics based game is so STOP saying “I can’t hold gunnss” that’s how it works

Now what I think it is actually fun with the ragdolls and great verity of weapons
